rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RILEY GEORGE ROWE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Application For Reconsideration Of Order For Final Distribution Of Estate Based On New Circumstances, Facts And Mistake Pursuant To Ccp 1008(B) And 473(B)
rulings.Rulings: No opposition filed. The Motion for Reocnsideration is granted. Upon reconsideration of the new facts presented in the motion, the Court grants the request to amend the Order for Final Distribution. Counsel for executor to prepare Order Granting Reconsideration in which the Court grants reconsideration of the Order for Final Distribution, and upon reconsideration of the new facts presented in the motion grants the request to Amend the Order for Final Distribution. Counsel for executor to present, at the same time, an Amended Order for Final Distribution, nunc pro tunc to May 10, 2013. Any party who wishes to argue the ruling must contact the court (415-551-3702) and the moving party prior to 5:00 p.m. on 6/18/2013 or the tentative will become the ruling of the Court.
